tasks.title: Local workflow proof seed for qdrant-cleanup
acceptance_criteria: workflow-proof resolves qdrant-cleanup from the latest runtime run
required reviewer, qa, and security reviews are recorded as authenticated approvals
evidence: verification: node --experimental-strip-types src/admin.ts workflow-proof --run-id latest --task-id qdrant-cleanup

tasks.title: Install graphify on first setup and run initial wiki build
acceptance_criteria: setup-archon.sh installs graphify via uv/pip if absent
setup-archon.sh runs graphify . --wiki on first install
.graphifyignore seeded to consuming repos with non-code exclusions
evidence: commit 334b2f8: feat: install graphify on first setup and run initial wiki build

tasks.title: Fix codebase audit weakpoints and inconsistencies
evidence: blocked: B1 (serve-ui), C1 (bootstrap NOT NULL), G1 (qdrant src cleanup)

tasks.title: Phase 1 repo-local skill evolution foundation
acceptance_criteria: cli.ts adds a repo-skill directive to consuming repo context when non-empty
.archon/rules/skill-format.md documents SKILL.md format and naming rules
hook-policy.mjs whitelists .archon/skills/** as a permitted write path
evidence: commit 80f009e: feat: Phase 1 repo-local skill evolution foundation

tasks.title: Add qdrant_collection default to unblock bootstrap (C1)
Remove serve-ui dead command and archon:ui script injection (B1)
acceptance_criteria: src/admin/archon.ts contains no reference to serve-ui or uiServerPath
src/install/merge.ts does not inject archon:ui script

tasks.title: Drop qdrant columns and remove all dead Qdrant code from src/ (G1/I1/I3/I4/B2)
acceptance_criteria: src/domain/types.ts has no qdrantUrl or qdrantCollection fields
src/store/postgres-store.ts has no qdrant column references
src/admin.ts does not select qdrant columns
src/mcp/tools.ts archon_runtime_health description mentions no qdrant
audit-fixes status is done in task-queue.json

tasks.title: Fix CLAUDE.md routing gaps: git-conventions, skill/agent relationship, unrouted agents (G2/I2/G3)
acceptance_criteria: CLAUDE.md Recurring routing entry for agent-runtime names both skill and agent
CLAUDE.md Default role chain notes specialist-on-demand agents
